pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target JDK 11.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency to replace removed java.sun annotations in JDK 11.
Replace deprecated FindBugs annotations with SpotBugs annotations compatible with JDK 11.
Upgrade JUnit from version 4 to 5 to support modern testing features and JDK 11 compatibility.
Upgrade Mockito to version 4.8.0 which requires JDK 11.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.10.1 to ensure proper compilation with JDK 11.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.0.0-M7 to support JUnit 5 and JDK 11.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to 3.4.1 to fix compatibility issues with JDK 11 javadoc tool.
Upgrade Checkstyle to 10.3.2 which requires JDK 11.
Upgrade PMD to 6.48.0 which requires JDK 11.
Upgrade SpotBugs Maven plugin to 4.7.2.0 for JDK 11 compatibility.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to 0.8.8 for JDK 11 support.
Upgrade Apache Commons Lang to 3.12.0.
Add Apache Commons IO dependency version 2.11.0.
Add AssertJ dependency version 3.23.1 for fluent assertions.
Add ArchUnit dependency version 0.23.1 for architecture testing.
Add EqualsVerifier dependency version 3.10.1 for testing equals/hashCode contracts.
Add JUnit Platform Launcher dependency version 1.9.0.
Add NullAway dependency version 0.9.9 for null safety analysis.
Add Error Prone dependency version 2.15.0 for static analysis.
Upgrade maven-site-plugin to 3.9.1.
Upgrade maven-source-plugin to 3.2.1.
Upgrade maven-resources-plugin to 3.3.0.
Upgrade maven-jar-plugin to 3.2.2.
Upgrade maven-pmd-plugin to 3.19.0.
Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to 3.1.2.
Add FindSecBugs plugin version 1.12.0 for security analysis.
Upgrade pitest-maven plugin to 1.9.5.
Add pitest-junit5-plugin version 1.0.0 for JUnit 5 mutation testing.
Add revapi-maven-plugin version 0.14.7 for API compatibility checking.
Add nexus-staging-maven-plugin version 1.6.13 for deployment.
Add maven-gpg-plugin version 3.0.1 for signing artifacts.
Upgrade maven-release-plugin to 2.5.3.
Add assertj-assertions-generator-maven-plugin version 2.2.0.
Upgrade maven-enforcer-plugin to 3.1.0.
Upgrade maven-dependency-plugin to 3.1.2.
Add depgraph-maven-plugin version 4.0.2.
Bump project version from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 3.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Update project name, description, and developer information.
Update SCM connection URLs to use explicit artifact ID.
Add Creative Commons license information alongside MIT license.
Update developer email and organization details.
Update project URL to use HTTPS.
Add module name property for JPMS support.
Add argLine property for Surefire logging configuration.
Add dependency management section for NullAway.

README.md.general_idea: Translate the README content from German to English to broaden accessibility.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced German text 'Java Kodierungsrichtlinien' with English 'Each Java project should follow a given coding style'.

README.md.general_idea: Explicitly document that the project now requires JDK 11 or higher to compile.
README.md.human_impl: Added warning '❗Compiling this project requires a JDK version of 11 or higher'.

README.md.general_idea: Update references to static analysis tools to reflect current names and URLs (e.g., FindBugs to SpotBugs).
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'FindBugs' link to 'SpotBugs' and updated other tool URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Add CI and quality badges to the README to display project health metrics.
README.md.human_impl: Added badges for GitHub Actions, Codacy, Codecov, and LGTM.

README.md.general_idea: Add a structured table of contents and list of recommended books to the README.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections for 'Content of the style guide' and 'path-breaking books'.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the licensing terms for documentation and source code in the README.
README.md.human_impl: Added text and badges for Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 and MIT license.

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add SuppressWarningsHolder module to enable suppression of checkstyle warnings via annotations.
Reformat XML indentation to use 2 spaces instead of 4 for consistency.
etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.human_impl: Changed indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces throughout the file.

etc/checkstyle-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add a comment with project coordinates for traceability.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Refactor PMD configuration from legacy individual rule references to modern category-based rule references with exclusions.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Replaced explicit `<rule ref="rulesets/java/...">` entries with `<rule ref="category/java/...">` blocks and added `<exclude>` tags for specific rules.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Add Maven project property placeholder to PMD configuration header for better traceability.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<!-- ${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}:${project.version} -->` comment at the top of the file.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Configure PMD to ignore specific annotations when checking for unnecessary constructors.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="ignoredAnnotations" value="org.kohsuke.stapler.DataBoundConstructor"/>` to the UnnecessaryConstructor rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Customize PMD class naming convention rules to allow specific utility class patterns.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="utilityClassPattern" value="[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]+"/>` to the ClassNamingConventions rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Disable setter checking in PMD linguistic naming rules to reduce noise.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="checkSetters" value="false"/>` to the LinguisticNaming rule.

etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Adjust PMD confusing ternary rule to ignore else-if chains.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.human_impl: Added `<property name="ignoreElseIf" value="true"/>` to the ConfusingTernary rule.
